title: Newly Built Head Start Facility in Shishmaref – Grand Opening!
summary: On Wednesday August 30th, Kawerak Board, staff and the Shishmaref community came together to celebrate the new Head Start Facility Grand Opening. We are so excited for this building to be a reality and to be together to celebrate it! Everyone gathered in the classroom to begin the celebration. Kawerak Shishmaref Board Representative Johnson Eningowuk offered a welcome and prayer. Attendees also heard from Board Chair Frank Katchatag, President Melanie Bahnke, and Head Start...
